argument_quality_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified that Arabic text is non-diagnostic and conceded to the stronger regulatory evidence.
argument_quality_notes.landscape: Agent correctly identified that terrain/architecture is generic to the region and conceded to the regulatory evidence.
argument_quality_notes.botanics: Agent correctly identified that scrubland is cosmopolitan and conceded to the regulatory evidence.
argument_quality_notes.regulatory: Agent consistently provided the strongest evidence (curb markings) and effectively dismantled the generic arguments of opponents.
argument_quality_notes.meta: Agent did not participate in the debate.

revision_justification_notes.linguistic: Revision was justified by the realization that linguistic evidence was generic and regulatory evidence was specific.
revision_justification_notes.landscape: Revision was justified by the realization that landscape features were soft evidence compared to regulatory hard constraints.
revision_justification_notes.botanics: Revision was justified by the realization that vegetation was non-diagnostic.
revision_justification_notes.regulatory: Agent maintained a strong position supported by specific visual evidence.
revision_justification_notes.meta: Agent did not participate in the debate.

debate_contribution_notes.linguistic: Agent conceded effectively but did not add new visual observations beyond R1.
debate_contribution_notes.landscape: Agent conceded effectively but did not add new visual observations beyond R1.
debate_contribution_notes.botanics: Agent conceded effectively but did not add new visual observations beyond R1.
debate_contribution_notes.regulatory: Agent successfully anchored the consensus on the specific visual feature of the curb markings.
debate_contribution_notes.meta: Agent did not participate in the debate.

verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly prioritized the Regulatory agent (hard constraints) against the other agents to resolve the ambiguity. The pairings were logical and efficient.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly followed the evidence hierarchy, prioritizing the hard regulatory constraint (curb markings) identified by the Regulatory and Meta agents over the generic landscape and linguistic evidence.
